title: Discovered Currently Not Indexed — 503 Pages Classification
severity: CRITICAL — largest not-indexed group, core of the problem
problem: Google knows about these pages (discovered via sitemap, internal links, or crawling) but is choosing not to index them. This is the primary signal that Google doesn't trust QFINHUB's page quality.

A_real_money_page.description: Calculator, decision, or blog pages that SHOULD be indexed
A_real_money_page.examples: Some deep calculators may be here
A_real_money_page.action: IMPROVE quality + strengthen internal links + ensure in sitemap

B_real_guide_blog_decision.description: Blog posts, guides, decisions that should be indexed
B_real_guide_blog_decision.action: Verify quality, update if thin, add internal links

C_useful_support_page.action: Ensure in sitemap, improve if thin

D_thin_scenario_tool_variant.description: Tool variants, scenarios with little unique content
D_thin_scenario_tool_variant.examples: Most of the 503 are likely here
D_thin_scenario_tool_variant.action: DO NOT promote — reduce internal links, do not index

E_duplicate_cannibalization.description: Pages too similar to other indexed pages
E_duplicate_cannibalization.action: Canonical to best version or consolidate

F_low_value_programmatic.description: Auto-generated pages with no unique insight

G_old_obsolete.description: Pages no longer relevant or replaced
G_old_obsolete.action: 301 redirect if replaced, 410 if truly gone

H_unknown.description: Cannot classify without full URL list
H_unknown.action: Export full list from GSC for classification

key_insight: ~300-450 of 503 are likely D/E/F — low-value pages that should NOT receive internal authority or sitemap promotion. The remaining ~50-150 are real pages worth improving.

action_plan.immediate: Export full 503 URL list from GSC
action_plan.priority: Identify all A/B/C pages and move them into index via quality improvements + internal links
action_plan.medium: Reduce internal links to D/E/F pages
action_plan.blocked: DO NOT mass noindex or delete without Qasem approval
